models.deploymentState: Tracks whether the section is showing the setup wizard or the live status dashboard. Switches from 'setup' to 'deployed' once all 5 wizard steps are confirmed.
models.setupStep: One of the 5 sequential wizard steps for configuring the EC2 runner. Contains copy-ready shell commands and completion state.
models.setupCommand: A single shell command within a setup step. Has a human-readable label, the command string, and an optional explanatory comment.
models.instanceStatus: Live metadata about the EC2 instance running the Test OS cron job — state, ID, region, and public IP.
models.cronConfig: Configuration of the nightly cron schedule — the cron expression, the script path, and the last/next run timestamps.
models.logLine: A single line from cron.log. Has a timestamp, severity level, and message.

relationships: A deploymentState has one instanceStatus (once deployed)
A deploymentState has one cronConfig (once deployed)
A deploymentState has many logLines (the latest run log tail)

steps.title: Launch EC2 Instance
steps.description: Launch a t3.medium Ubuntu 24.04 instance tagged test-os-runner. Ensure the security group allows outbound HTTPS.

commands.label: Launch instance via AWS CLI
commands.command:
aws ec2 run-instances \
  --image-id ami-0c7217cdde317cfec \
  --instance-type t3.medium \
  --key-name your-key-pair \
  --security-group-ids sg-xxxxxxxx \
  --tag-specifications \
    'ResourceType=instance,Tags=[{Key=Name,Value=test-os-runner}]'
commands.comment: Or launch manually in the AWS Console — use Ubuntu 24.04, t3.medium.

steps.title: Install Dependencies
steps.description: SSH into the instance and install Node.js, npm, git, curl, and the Hermes agent CLI.

commands.label: Install system dependencies
commands.command: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y nodejs npm git curl

steps.title: Clone Test OS Workspace
steps.description: Clone the Test OS repository onto the EC2 instance and install its Node dependencies.

commands.label: Clone the Test OS repo
commands.comment: Replace YOUR_ORG with your GitHub organization or username.

steps.title: Configure Secrets
steps.description: Store your GitHub PAT and Hermes API key in AWS Secrets Manager. The EC2 instance IAM role must have secretsmanager:GetSecretValue permission.

commands.label: Store GitHub token
commands.comment: The PAT needs read access to your app repo.

commands.label: Attach IAM policy to instance role
commands.comment: Or attach a least-privilege policy granting only GetSecretValue on test-os/*.

steps.title: Set Up Cron Schedule
steps.description: Make run-tests.sh executable, do a manual smoke test, then add the nightly cron entry.

commands.label: Make the script executable and smoke test
commands.comment: First run will clone the app, build it, and execute the suite. Expect ~5 minutes.

logLines.message: Pulling latest app code from github.com/ORG/agent-os-app
Vision analysis slow — browser response >2s on /foundation route
Hermes run complete: 55 tests, 49 passed, 6 failed (229s)
